name: Adli Caldwell
hobbies_and_interests: Reading non‑fiction (history, technology), Home cooking and recipe experimentation, Listening to jazz and blues, Jogging in local parks, Woodworking small projects, Playing chess, Church attendance and community volunteering
skills_and_expertise: Customer service, Cash handling, Order management, Food safety compliance, Time management, Team coordination, Conflict resolution, Basic culinary preparation, Inventory control, POS system operation
complementary_info: Adli Caldwell is a dedicated and curious individual who balances a rigorous work schedule with personal interests and ambitions. As a seasoned waiter at a busy restaurant in Decatur, he demonstrates exceptional customer service, cash handling, and conflict resolution skills. His professional aspirations include advancing to a managerial position and eventually owning a café that combines traditional soul-food with innovative culinary techniques. Adli is deeply involved in his community, regularly volunteering and attending church. He maintains a healthy lifestyle through regular jogging and participation in the Decatur Runners club, while also following local sports teams. His hobbies include reading non-fiction, particularly on African-American history and technology, experimenting with home cooking, and listening to jazz and blues. Adli is currently working towards earning his GED and pursuing a hospitality management certification to support his career goals.
